project.name: ecomx-be
project.description: E-commerce platform backend built with Spring Boot, Spring Security, Hibernate, and Caffeine Cache, featuring personalized hybrid recommendation APIs.

layers.name: API Layer
layers.description: REST controllers exposing HTTP API endpoints and routing requests to core services.

layers.name: Service Layer
layers.description: Orchestrates business logic and implements core services and operations.

layers.name: Data Access Layer
layers.description: Spring Data JPA repository interfaces for managing database access and CRUD operations.

layers.name: Domain Model Layer
layers.description: Database entities, JPA mappings, annotations, and system-wide constants.

layers.name: Data Transfer Layer
layers.description: Request/response data transfer objects (DTOs) for deserialization and validation.

layers.name: Infrastructure & AOP Layer
layers.description: Spring configurations, security credentials, and AOP aspects for cross-cutting logging.

layers.name: Project Configuration
layers.description: Maven configurations, build scripts, workspace directories, and dependency controls.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Markdown user manuals, workflow diagrams, and recommendation system documentation.

tour.title: Project Overview & Workflows
tour.description: Start by reading README.md and WORKFLOW.md to understand the codebase purpose, technical stack, run guidelines, and detailed business flow diagrams (auth flow, product creation, entity relationships).

tour.title: Web Security & JWT Credentials
tour.description: Understand the security entry point WebSecurityConfig and TokenProvider, which configure Spring Security filters, password encoders, and manage JWT access/refresh token generations and validations.
tour.languageLesson: Spring Security uses the SecurityFilterChain bean to define path authorization rules. TokenProvider parses claims from JWT strings using signing keys.

tour.title: User Profile & Delivery Addresses
tour.description: Explore the controllers for register, login, profile updates, and shipping address management. These handle customer profiles and geocoded delivery coordinates.

tour.title: Product Catalog & Brand Navigation
tour.description: Examine the product and category REST controllers. They handle category trees (root/children), price listings, brand mapping, and product variants.

tour.title: User Behavior Tracking & Logging AOP
tour.description: Analyze the aspects and log collectors that capture admin activity audits and customer action history (views, clicks, purchases) to feed the analytics engine.
tour.languageLesson: Spring AOP aspects utilize @Around join points to intercept method executions, log performance metadata, and record audit details before/after completion.

tour.title: Hybrid Recommendation Engine
tour.description: Dive into recommendation endpoints and configuration blends. This module serves personalized items on the home feed,PDP similar items, session-based boosters, and post-purchase recommendations.

tour.title: Order Flow & State Machine
tour.description: Follow the core OrderController and OrderServiceImpl. They manage shopping cart calculations, checkout pricing previews, payment confirmation, and status state updates (Awaiting Shipment, Completed).

tour.title: VNPay Payment Gateway Integration
tour.description: Review VnpayController and its properties configuration. This manages redirect URL generation, callback validation (IPN), and transaction finalization.

tour.title: Build Configuration & Dependencies
tour.description: End the tour with pom.xml, which manages Maven dependencies (Spring Boot, Cloudinary, Redis, Caffeine cache) and controls the build lifecycle.
